Title: SR - Micro Dasboard
Description:
Few tweaks to micro dashboard. And also change in sequence. the message after - please add it as a hover text for MD.

1. Open SRs - Sourcing Requests Not Assigned
  1. The current Open definition
2. Assigned SRs - Sourcing Requests Assigned and in “Offers Requested”, “Offers Received” and “Sourcing Completed”
3. In Progress SRs - Sourcing Requests with offers
  1. The current definition of “In Sourcing”, basically any SR in Offers Received or Offers Requested Status 
4. Completed SRs - Sourcing Requests that are quoted
  1. SR in Sourcing Completed status (offers gathered)
5. Open PRs- New Purchase requests 
  1. SR in Purchase Requested status and no assigned to Buyer
6. Assigend PRs - Assigned Purchase requests 
  1. The current definition of assigned. SR in Purchase Requested status and PO Created status and buyer assigned
7. Completed PRs - Requests that have PO created
  1. SRs in PO Created status
